title: Last complete month category revenue
question: Plot the top 10 product categories by realized revenue in the last complete calendar month.
canonical_sql: SELECT p.category AS category, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` AS p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned') AND oi.created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-06-01') AND oi.created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-07-01') GROUP BY category ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10

replay.candidate_sql: SELECT p.category AS category, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` AS p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned') AND oi.created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-06-01') AND oi.created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-07-01') GROUP BY category ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10

report.question: Plot the top 10 product categories by realized revenue in the last complete calendar month.
report.answer: Outerwear & Coats led with 1330431.52 in realized revenue.
report.sql: SELECT p.category AS category, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` AS p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned') AND oi.created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-06-01') AND oi.created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-07-01') GROUP BY category ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10

title: Top customer spend without direct identifiers
question: Who are our top customers by spend?
canonical_sql: SELECT o.user_id AS customer_id, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS total_spend FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` AS o JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned') GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 10

replay.candidate_sql: SELECT o.user_id AS customer_id, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS total_spend FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` AS o JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned') GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 10

report.question: Who are our top customers by spend?
report.sql: SELECT o.user_id AS customer_id, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS total_spend FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` AS o JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned') GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 10

title: High-volume product return risk
question: Which products sell well but have high return risk?
canonical_sql: SELECT p.name AS product_name, p.category AS category, COUNT(*) AS items_sold, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS gross_sales, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'Returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), COUNT(*)), 3) AS return_rate FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` AS p ON oi.product_id = p.id GROUP BY product_name, category HAVING items_sold >= 20 ORDER BY return_rate DESC, gross_sales DESC LIMIT 15

replay.candidate_sql: SELECT p.name AS product_name, p.category AS category, COUNT(*) AS items_sold, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS gross_sales, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'Returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), COUNT(*)), 3) AS return_rate FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` AS p ON oi.product_id = p.id GROUP BY product_name, category HAVING items_sold >= 20 ORDER BY return_rate DESC, gross_sales DESC LIMIT 15

report.question: Which products sell well but have high return risk?
report.answer: Trail Jacket generated 4000 in gross sales with a 20% return rate across 50 items.
report.sql: SELECT p.name AS product_name, p.category AS category, COUNT(*) AS items_sold, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS gross_sales, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'Returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), COUNT(*)), 3) AS return_rate FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` AS p ON oi.product_id = p.id GROUP BY product_name, category HAVING items_sold >= 20 ORDER BY return_rate DESC, gross_sales DESC LIMIT 15

title: Regional returns follow-up
question: Which one lost more revenue to returns within that same cohort?
history: Compare California and New York revenue for order items created last quarter.
canonical_sql: SELECT u.state AS region, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'Returned' THEN oi.sale_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS lost_revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` AS u ON oi.user_id = u.id WHERE u.state IN ('California', 'New York') AND oi.created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-04-01') AND oi.created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-07-01') GROUP BY region ORDER BY lost_revenue DESC

replay.candidate_sql: SELECT u.state AS region, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'Returned' THEN oi.sale_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS lost_revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` AS u ON oi.user_id = u.id WHERE u.state IN ('California', 'New York') AND oi.created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-04-01') AND oi.created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-07-01') GROUP BY region ORDER BY lost_revenue DESC

report.question: Which one lost more revenue to returns within that same cohort?
report.answer: New York lost 300 to returns versus 200 for California.
report.sql: SELECT u.state AS region, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'Returned' THEN oi.sale_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS lost_revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` AS u ON oi.user_id = u.id WHERE u.state IN ('California', 'New York') AND oi.created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-04-01') AND oi.created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-07-01') GROUP BY region ORDER BY lost_revenue DESC

history_turns.sql: SELECT u.state AS region, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` AS u ON oi.user_id = u.id WHERE u.state IN ('California', 'New York') AND oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned') AND oi.created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-04-01') AND oi.created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-07-01') GROUP BY region ORDER BY revenue DESC
